steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that "as renewable energy becomes more economically competitive, demand for petroleum falls." The correct choice must reflect this causal relationship: renewable energy competition drives down petroleum demand.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: describes a pattern not established in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B: identifies renewable energy's growing competitiveness as a factor reducing petroleum demand — matches the passage's causal claim directly. ✓
  • Choice C: denies that companies are affected, contradicting the passage's implication. ✗
  • Choice D: reverses the relationship described in the passage. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
